task_description: Create a basic Lambda function skeleton (SleepAudioProcessor) and integrate it into the Step Functions state machine as a Task/invocation step. The Lambda serves as a placeholder for future audio processing logic. Follow strict TDD with CDK assertions.

verification.summary: All 39 tests pass (33 existing + 6 new Lambda tests). TSC compiles without errors. CDK synth succeeds. Tests verify Lambda construct properties, DynamoDB permissions, state machine integration, and IAM policies - all would fail if the implementation were reverted.
